name: project-manager-desktop
description: Secure Electron shell for the Project Manager React frontend.

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n renderer,electron -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron"
